commit_message:
docs(adw): add observed-live ledger for PARITY §10 guarantees

Add `adw_sdlc/docs/OBSERVED-LIVE-LEDGER.md`, the live counterpart to
PARITY.md's mocked-seam checklist. It carries one row per PARITY.md
Section-10 guarantee (all 13), each with an explicit observed-live
status drawn from a four-token legend (✅ observed-live / 🟡 partial /
⏳ not-yet-observed / N/A not-live-observable) plus its mocked status and
run-id evidence.

The ledger is seeded conservatively from the one existing live `claude`
run (issue #304 → PR #331, parity fix #332, run `007fd5ba`, ≈ $34.76):
6 ✅, 4 🟡, 2 ⏳, 1 N/A. Rows are marked ✅ only where a committed
document (PARITY.md / MVP-READINESS.md) supports it; the load-bearing
security/failure guarantees (#5 secret withholding, #8 bounded loops)
stay ⏳, matching MVP-READINESS §1's still-owed list. The `agents/`
artifact tree is not vendored here, so the seed is doc-grounded only and
the update procedure documents how to upgrade rows after future runs.

- Link the ledger from MVP-READINESS.md §1 and reconcile the stale
  "12 boxes" wording to "13 Section-10 guarantees" (the count predates
  the additive State-equivalence row); flip the bullet's ❌ → 🔧 since
  the artifact now exists (the gate itself stays unchecked).
- Add `test/observed-live-ledger-doc.test.ts`: asserts the four
  acceptance criteria mechanically (all 13 guarantees present, each data
  row carries a status token, seed evidence cited, MVP-READINESS links
  the ledger) and a cross-document sync check that parses PARITY.md
  Section 10 directly so a future add/remove of a guarantee fails the
  suite instead of silently drifting.
- Add ledger entry to README.md documentation map.
- Update LIVE-RUN-BATCH.md status (issue #3 in progress).
- Record §8u in HANDOVER.md; update test count 466 → 482.

Docs/feature artifact only: no kernel, prompt-pack, config, schema, or
runtime change. The ledger lives outside `.adw/prompts`, so `pack:check`
is unaffected. `npm run verify` stays green (482 tests).

closes #3
pr_body:
## Summary

Adds the **observed-live ledger** — the live counterpart to `PARITY.md`'s
mocked-seam checklist. `PARITY.md` is a wall of green boxes, but nearly every
box is proven only under stubs; the one live `claude` run that exists (PR #331)
surfaced a real parity bug (#332). This ledger asks the harder question for each
PARITY Section-10 guarantee: **has it been seen at least once in a real run, not
only under mocks?**

It is the readiness dashboard called for by `MVP-READINESS.md` §1 and is scoped
to the `claude` cutover gate (the adopted (A) MVP).

## Changes

| File | Change |
| --- | --- |
| `adw_sdlc/docs/OBSERVED-LIVE-LEDGER.md` | **New.** Legend, one row per PARITY §10 guarantee (13 rows), conservative seed, and a "how to update after a live run" procedure. |
| `adw_sdlc/MVP-READINESS.md` | **Edit (§1 only).** Links the ledger, reconciles "12 boxes" → "13 Section-10 guarantees", flips the bullet marker `❌ → 🔧`. |
| `adw_sdlc/test/observed-live-ledger-doc.test.ts` | **New.** Encodes the acceptance criteria + a cross-document sync check against PARITY.md Section 10. |
| `adw_sdlc/README.md` | **Edit.** Adds `docs/OBSERVED-LIVE-LEDGER.md` to the documentation map. |
| `adw_sdlc/docs/LIVE-RUN-BATCH.md` | **Edit.** Status updated to reflect issue #3 has been run. |
| `adw_sdlc/HANDOVER.md` | **Edit.** Adds §8u recording this run; test count updated 466 → 482. |

## Seed (conservative, doc-grounded)

Seeded from the single live run — issue #304 → PR #331 (squash-merged), parity
fix #332, run `007fd5ba`, cost ≈ $34.76 — using a four-token legend so each row
carries an honest status:

**6 ✅ observed-live · 4 🟡 partial/inferred · 2 ⏳ not-yet-observed · 1 N/A.**

A row is `✅` **only** where a committed document supports it. The load-bearing
security/failure guarantees — **#5 secret withholding** and **#8 bounded loops +
no-retry-on-timeout** — stay `⏳`, matching the still-owed items in
`MVP-READINESS.md` §1. The `agents/007fd5ba/` artifact tree is not vendored in
this checkout, so the seed is grounded in the committed docs only; the update
procedure documents how to upgrade `🟡` rows once artifacts are available.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Ledger lists every PARITY.md Section-10 guarantee (all 13).
- [x] Each row has an explicit observed-live status.
- [x] Linked from `MVP-READINESS.md`.
- [x] `npm run verify` stays green.

## Verification

`npm run verify` from `adw_sdlc/` — **green** (typecheck → lint:env → pack:check
→ test → build → rm -rf dist). 482 tests pass (466 prior + 16 new), including the
new `observed-live-ledger-doc.test.ts` and the unchanged `mvp-readiness-doc.test.ts`.

The cross-document sync test parses PARITY.md Section 10 directly, so a future
add/remove of a guarantee fails the suite rather than silently desyncing the
ledger.

## Scope / risk

Docs + one test only. No kernel, prompt-pack, config, schema, or runtime change;
the ledger lives outside `.adw/prompts`, so `pack:check` is unaffected and no
`pack:generate` is needed. Rollback is deleting the two new files and reverting
the one-line MVP-READINESS edit.

closes #3

review_findings.description: Ledger cites hardcoded source line numbers (e.g. MVP-READINESS.md:87–90 for the secret-boundary row) that no test guards; this PR's own §1 edit shifted MVP-READINESS lines, leaving that citation ~2 lines stale (the cited text now sits ~line 91). Citations will silently rot on future doc edits — prefer section/anchor references over line numbers.

The 'every data row carries an explicit observed-live status token' test checks row.includes(token) across the whole row, so it passes even if the Observed-live? cell were empty (every row's Mocked? column already contains ✅). The later per-token cross-check on split('|')[4] compensates, so coverage is intact, but this named assertion is weaker than it reads.
